description: Wraps a responsive set of static KPI or metric cards.
uiDescription: Renders compact numeric summary cards in a clean multi-column layout.
generationNotes: Use this as the parent around statCard blocks.
This pattern works best when each item has a short label and one prominent value.
Prefer 2 to 4 items for a balanced layout.
useCases: KPI summaries, growth numbers, report highlights, and static dashboard-style overviews.
Avoid using it for charts, detailed tables, or interactive analytics.
